rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real, verifiable issue at Deck.lean:73 where `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` uses the full default simp set instead of `simp only`, making the proof brittle to simp set changes — a genuine proof-quality concern in Mathlib-style Lean 4. Review 1 misses this, so acting on Review 2's guidance produces a more robust PR.
